United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An escaped convict visits a spinster and her niece seeking his pen pal.

programme.title: Classic Artists: Cream
programme.desc: The definitive story of 60s rock supergroup Cream, featuring concert footage and interviews with Eric Clapton, Ginger Baker and Jack Bruce.

programme.title: Eric Clapton's Crossroads Live in LA Sept '23
programme.desc: A truly unique event, this special brings together the very best of the greatest rock and blues artists of all time.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie to be announced.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie to be announced.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie to be announced.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie to be announced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Grady Felton's return to the village is met with anger from the locals; when a barrister is killed, he becomes a suspect; he is targeted in an arson attack.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called in to investigate the death of amateur astronomer Jeremy Harper, who was killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer is buzzing with excitement at the arrival of the annual Paramount Dance Extravaganza; but behind the sequins and smiles are deep running feuds and passions, and when the stakes are high, the desire to win has outweighed everything.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The defendant says she and the plaintiff, her former best friend, had a falling out after she refused to let the plaintiff use her car for a drug transaction.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: As the ladies navigate their own personal challenges, the divide between the friend group grows too large to ignore; when LeBrina disengages and La'Torria gives up, Roe organizes a group therapy session to repair their friendships.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: After an explosive group therapy session, LeBrina attempts to repair her broken friendships. Alaina and Chloe each navigate their current relationship struggles. Roe struggles emotionally with the challenges of co-parenting.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: Newcomer Ashley threatens to bring drama to the group when her shady stunt at pickleball turns La'Torria sour. Roe is at a crossroads in her co-parenting journey and is forced to make a decision. Chloe's daughters disapprove of her love life.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: Lateshia confronts Glen about his meeting with a divorce lawyer. Kerri's mother-in-law demands that she puts family first. Latrice and her mom attempt to convince Cliff to reconsider having another baby. Marie's first date involves a musical surprise.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: Coming in hot and with an agenda, Lateshia and Latrice swap husbands for the day. Lateshia and Glen's marriage hits a breaking point at the reservoir. As Matt tries to mediate the fight between his mom and wife, Kerri enlists her own mother as backup.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: Selena's indecision about her wedding affects her bridal shower. Matt tries to mediate the feud between his wife and his mother. As a trial run for having a child, Latrice and Cliff babysit London-Symone. Marie gets her children involved in her business.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Gregory is hesitant when kids start hanging out in his classroom at lunch, looking to him for advice; Barbara is shocked to find Tariq is dating the mother of one of her students; Janine and Jacob try to hire an ASL interpreter.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Brea attempt remaining just friends post-breakup; Beverly goes out of her way to protect Adam from further heartbreak; Barry tries to get closer with Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry comes face-to-face with his ex-girlfriends and their boyfriends during Erica and Geoff's joint bachelor/bachelorette party; Adam intervenes when Lou takes over the planning of the wedding video.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy tries to help her employees cope with Mateo's ICE detention -- and with the introduction of a new robot co-worker that makes them fear they could be replaced.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy attempts to gather glowing character testimony for Mateo's immigration lawyer but comes up short; Jonah plans an engagement party for Sandra, infuriating Dina, while Glenn and Marcus compete for Mateo's old locker.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: A group of dedicated, passionate teachers work to help their students succeed in life despite being outnumbered and underfunded.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Gregory is hesitant when kids start hanging out in his classroom at lunch, looking to him for advice; Barbara is shocked to find Tariq is dating the mother of one of her students; Janine and Jacob try to hire an ASL interpreter.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: After a student is caught smoking, the staff come together to revamp the outdated drug policy; Janine tries to prep the new substitute teacher for her class, but finds it challenging to give up her former role.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: When Barbara's church choir uses the gym for rehearsals, Ava notices tension in the group; Jacob's eagerness for a full social calendar worries Gregory; Melissa and Janine investigate a new substitute.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy tries to help her employees cope with Mateo's ICE detention -- and with the introduction of a new robot co-worker that makes them fear they could be replaced.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy attempts to gather glowing character testimony for Mateo's immigration lawyer but comes up short; Jonah plans an engagement party for Sandra, infuriating Dina, while Glenn and Marcus compete for Mateo's old locker.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Brea attempt remaining just friends post-breakup; Beverly goes out of her way to protect Adam from further heartbreak; Barry tries to get closer with Erica.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma meet their new neighbor; Jung starts a new work romance; Janet doesn't like how sweet Gerald's new girlfriend is.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an assault at gunpoint is witnessed through a neighboring window, the squad scrambles to locate the victim to confirm she's safe; a threat to extort the victim's family leads to a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates a string of sexual assaults targeting local female psychiatrists; the squad celebrates a promotion.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an actress accuses a high-powered media mogul of attempted rape, Benson finds herself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse; changes in the squad room put Carisi between a rock and a hard place.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson works with a young woman to help her remember the details and suspects in her rape; in order to learn a new witness interview technique, Rollins and Fin have to experience it for themselves.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial predator targeting men in gay bars proves difficult to catch, until a celebrity comes forward with his story.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: For many years, humans have reported various UFO sightings around the world, fueling speculation about the existence of life on other worlds. In 2011, mankind learns the truth the hard way when alien invaders attack. One by one, the world's great cities fall, leaving Los Angeles as the battleground for humanity's last stand. It's up to a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon to dra

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: In the wake of Carmine Falcone's death, Oz attempts to fill the power vacuum left in Gotham's criminal underworld. (1 of.

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Sofia works to secure her family's strength, while Oz attempts to play the Falcone and Maroni families to his advantage. (2 of.

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Amber forms an uneasy alliance with her prisoner as they're pulled deeper into a dangerous criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Last Of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellie's fate while navigating the ruins of Boston. (S1, ep 2 of.

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: A storm surge cuts Morfa Halen off from the outside world, as another body is discovered. Bull closes in on the truth.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Camp TV
programme.desc: Becoming a puppet; playing Skee-Ball; meeting a bear cuscus; reading "Night at the Fair.".

programme.title: Albie's Elevator
programme.desc: Jay and Albie plan a surprise party for Bon Bon; Albie and Mila learn from an illustrator how to think creatively and make their own movie masterpiece.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.desc: Solving a word mystery; making a mask; playing a math movement game.

programme.title: MotorWeek
programme.desc: The Toyota C-HR battery-electric utility; BMW M2 CS.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: A detailed look into news stories from around the world from the BBC news desk in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: George works with Special Branch officers to identify a badly burned body found near an RAF base.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: As the staff anxiously await the results of Kevin's skin cancer test, Michael tries to get everyone to celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Part One: Everything changes when Ally's job takes her to Berlin and Paul tries to muddle along without her.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Part Two: Stress and fear reveals cracks in the family as Luke is rushed to hospital. A Sky original comedy starring Martin Freeman.

programme.title: Ellie Taylor: Palavering
programme.desc: Comedian, presenter and actor Ellie Taylor performs at the Bloomsbury Theatre, covering everything from how to keep the spark alive in marriage to her stint on Strictly.

programme.title: The Office Movers
programme.desc: Everett and his team take on a job at Trisha's office, hoping it'll lead to her assigning Shazam the most prestigious position on her roster.

programme.title: The Office Movers
programme.desc: There's Guys and Lows In Life, Brother: Shazam has finally stepped up to their biggest job and Everett and his crew are ready for it with some help and a surprise temp worker.

programme.title: I Love LA
programme.desc: Pigs in the City: The girls return to New York for a fashion event. Maia tries to relax while Tallulah makes questionable styling choices.

programme.title: The F1 Show: Great Britain
programme.desc: The F1 Show positions itself at the centre of the British Grand Prix, providing a sneak peek of the paddock and the personalities involved at the heart of the race.

programme.title: Live British F1 GP: Practice 1
programme.desc: On Sprint weekend at Silverstone, the drivers have just an hour of practice ahead of Sprint Qualifying. British driver George Russell returned to winning ways in Austria last weekend.

programme.title: Hill
programme.desc: One name. Two world champions. In 1996, Damon Hill claimed the Formula 1 world championship, defying the odds and overcoming tragedy to become a racing legend in his own right.

programme.title: Live British F1 GP: Sprint Quali'
programme.desc: The British Grand Prix stages the fourth Sprint Qualifying session of 2026 as grid positions are set for Saturday's 12pm Sprint Race, where the fastest driver here will claim pole.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura becomes a murder suspect when her date is found dead, and she can not remember their evening together; Jane struggles to protect her best friend while doing her job.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura gains insight into her father; Korsak opens up about Cavanaugh's tragic past; Maura and Jane unravel a shocking secret about Paddy and Hope.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A viral video of Jane jeopardizes her career and reputation; the squad tries to solve a murder case involving a conspiracy theorist.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A popular high-school teacher is killed in a hit-and-run; Jane is preoccupied with Lt. Martinez's apparent favoritism toward his own drug unit.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A body is discovered on a home construction site; Brenda considers hiring a high-priced lawyer.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The squad investigates the death of a fellow law enforcement officer's daughter; Capt. Raydor focuses her efforts on Detective Sanchez.

programme.title: Major Crimes
programme.desc: A young woman and her 3-year-old son are shot to death while driving through gang territory in the wrong colored car; Amy Sykes begins an uneasy alliance with a disgraced former LAPD detective.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Phil (Bill Murray), a weatherman, is out to cover the annual emergence of the groundhog from its hole. He gets caught in a blizzard that he didn't predict and finds himself trapped in a time warp. He is doomed to relive the same day over and over again until he gets it right.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on t

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: A New York reporter heads to Australia to interview the living legend Mike Dundee (Paul Hogan). When she finally locates him, she is so taken with him that she brings him back with her to New York. In New York, Mike Dundee is amazed by the wonders of the city and the interesting people there.

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Andersen orders new pairings for the day - she's with a nervous Chen, and Nolan's with Grey.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Vasquez strives to prove his worth at 51, while Violet and Novak investigate a disturbing case. Herrmann works to maintain Molly's success.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A complicated case of sex and drug use divides the squad. Carisi must convince a jury to focus on the law and not the defendant's accusations.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a shooting at a nightclub, it appears that the FBI may have ignored previous threats from a local white supremacist group; Kristen wrestles with her commitment to the bureau and her responsibility to her community.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers unite to explore a mythical, uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean. Cut off from everything they know, they venture into the domain of the mighty Kong, igniting the ultimate battle between man and nature. As their mission of discovery soon becomes one of survival, they must fight to escape from a primal world where humanity does not belong.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan
programme.desc: It's been nearly a decade since Tarzan (Alexander Skarsgård), also known as John Clayton III, left Africa to live in Victorian England with his wife Jane. Danger lurks on the horizon as Leon Rom (Christoph Waltz), a treacherous envoy for King Leopold, devises a scheme that lures the couple to the Congo. Rom plans to capture Tarzan and deliver him to an old enemy in exchange for diamonds. When Jane

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Most Extreme Humans
programme.desc: In Brazil, Claudio lives with a condition that bent his head backward; ahead of his 50th birthday, he wants to climb a sacred mountain; in Norway, Birgitte lives with a different presentation of the same condition; she's training for the next Paralympics.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Kara gets emotional while watching never-before-seen footage of the royal banquet; Sarper reveals the surprising reason he thinks he sets off airport security scanners; Rebecca is furious watching Zied buddy up with Sarper at the bonfire.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: The cast reacts to never-before-seen footage as conversations about financial support, emotional security, and differing sexual needs lead to tension between the couples.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Rebecca gets nervous watching never-before-seen footage from Dr. Tara's sex therapy; the cast is quizzed on female anatomy; Russ explains what Pao's new toy taught him; Shekinah reacts strongly to Patrick's divorce advice to Guillermo.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Josh confronts Catie's old fling at her birthday party; Edward is grilled by Marissa's mom when meeting her family; Debby struggles with Mido; Anabelle wants Shea to stop partying; Thomas worries about Paula's spending; Maxwell's family questions Ashia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Josh confronts Catie's old fling at her birthday party; Edward is grilled by Marissa's mom when meeting her family; Debby struggles with Mido; Anabelle wants Shea to stop partying; Thomas worries about Paula's spending; Maxwell's family questions Ashia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: With bonus scenes; Catie's flirting pushes Josh over the edge; Annabelle makes a discovery about Shea's ex-wife; Mallorie and Rasit disagree on finances; Marissa sets her strict expectations for Edward; Thomas and Paula struggle to make a life together.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Navy fighter pilots Ben Gannon, Henry Purcell and Kara Wade are tasked with training an unmanned plane to hit important overseas targets. Ben doesn't trust the artificial-intelligence technology, especially after the plane is hit by lightning and rewired. However, the Navy is determined to put the plane in the air, even after it goes off on a mission of its own. Ben knows he has to stop the techno

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Even though agents J and K have been protecting the Earth from alien scum for many years, J still does not know much about his gruff partner. However, J soon gets an unexpected chance to find out what makes K tick when an alien criminal called Boris the Animal escapes, goes back to 1969, and kills K. With the fate of the planet at stake, J goes back in time and teams up with K's younger self to pu

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid (Seth Rogen), the heir to the largest newspaper fortune in Los Angeles, is a spoiled playboy who has been, thus far, happy to lead an aimless life. After his father (Tom Wilkinson) dies, Britt meets Kato (Jay Chou), a resourceful company employee. Realizing that they have the talent and resources to make something of their lives, Britt and Kato join forces as costumed crime-fighters to

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn to real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store; the big loser of the night suffers a punishment to make one's skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs; the loser performs his life story through songs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park; the three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys are hit with some bad reception while working behind a desk; the guys head to the park where they ask strangers for advice on their questionable life choice; tonight's big loser is tasked with taking photos of a water aerobics class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe use a two-way mirror to get each other to crack; the loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q get stuck in a grocery showdown, beg strangers for questionable quotes, and spew financial tips that are anything but sound; the night's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: Free Practice of the NASCAR Cup Series Race at Chicagoland Speedway in Joliet, Illinois.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Tara Lipinski unknowingly becomes the target of Anthony Davis's elaborate prank, while former NFL quarterback Robert Griffin III attends a feel-good locker-room dedication that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Savannah Bananas Pre-Game
programme.desc: A pregame look at the wild antics and trick plays used by the Savannah Bananas baseball team.

programme.title: Live: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Kinnick Stadium in Iowa City, Iowa.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Zuri London's devotion to a man on trial for murder pushes her to extreme lengths; she helps him flee from justice, thinking love will protect them.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Melissa Rios Roque's love for Kelsey McFoley drags her into a deadly scheme; to protect him from prison, Melissa helps orchestrate a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne gets into hot water when he is spotted holding hands with a woman other than Whitley.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: As his wedding nears, Dwayne's cold feet are thawed by the hot tempers of the combative future mothers-in-law.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley plans for a display of slave art until Lena (Jada Pinkett) reveals that Gilbert's ancestors owned slaves.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne and Whitley go separately to a Christmas party, unaware the other will be there.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise's friends show off the latest break-dancing steps while Cliff's buddies demonstrate the jitterbug.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo searches for the culprit who put marijuana in his schoolbook.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Vanessa struggles when she receives her first disappointing grade in her advanced-placement class.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff takes over the house chores while Clair investigates a shady mechanic.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's college track coach convinces him to run a match race against a former rival.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 must band together when one of its own is taken hostage.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 tackles a fire caused by a dropped jet engine, and one of their own is accused of a theft related to the incident; Kidd and Boden disapprove of Kylie's potential new love interest.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A family friend asks Herrmann for some advice on opening a bar; tensions run high between Emma and Violet; Kidd struggles to keep her team together.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the adult avatars they chose. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji - you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change

programme.title: Live: WWE Friday Night SmackDown
programme.desc: The superstars of World Wrestling Entertainment display their skills and athleticism, as scores are settled and enduring rivalries play out in the ring.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Johnny K-9 leads a double life as an in-ring brute and the leader of a biker gang implicated in drug trafficking, the bombing of a police station, and a gruesome double murder.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: In the mid '90s, wrestling is rocked by accusations of rampant steroid abuse; with star witness Hulk Hogan, prosecutors set out to prove that Vince McMahon is the one responsible.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Nick Gage is the self-proclaimed king of deathmatch wrestling, but his road to the top is marked with a six-year prison sentence for armed robbery and personal tragedies.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Brian Pillman quickly became infamous with a groundbreaking performance that made fact and fiction blur and led to his destruction.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: After enduring a horrific car wreck, Brian Pillman masks his injuries while pushing his body to the edge; his untimely death leaves his young family struggling to cope.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: After Japan's Atsushi Onita creates FMW and its spectacular matches featuring explosions and gratuitous gore, his handpicked successor takes his own life while drowning in debt.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: The Ultimate Warrior was a divisive force in and outside the ring; his first wife reveals how an aspiring chiropractor morphed himself into wrestling's most polarizing figure.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie, Tami and Evelyn regroup after being ambushed by Brandi; Jackie throws a party to celebrate sexuality; Cristen's sister arrives.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie throws a "love your body" party; Malaysia feels that Shaunie, Tami and Evelyn snubbed her; Cristen divides her friendship with Jackie.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami interviews possible surrogates; Saniy'yah throws a garden party; Malaysia confronts Shaunie, Tami and Evelyn; Jackie and BJ have words.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet and Michael are astounded when their often dim-witted son shines on an IQ test, ranking him as a genius.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After the children tease him about getting old, Michael pretends to injure his back playing Twister so they will have to cater to his every whim.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: An encounter with Michael's ex-girlfriend prompts Janet to get a makeover; on a dare, Junior tries to steal a bra from the girls' locker room.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael bowls against his archenemy Stu Tyler (Larry Miller); Trekkies at the bowling alley believe Claire is a Romulan queen.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After getting his driver's license, Jr. buys a clunker instead of the practical car Michael picked out for him.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet thinks Michael plans to golf on their anniversary, but he arranges to have Brian McKnight sing for them at a surprise ceremony to renew their vows.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: Preppie graduates (Josh Hamilton, Olivia d'Abo, Carlos Jacott) face their first year out of college and reminisce about student life.
